top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.spent > b.amount THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS over_budget_percentage
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.spent > b.amount THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_over_budget
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.spent > b.amount THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS over_budget_percentage
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.spent > b.amount THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS over_budget_percentage
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;
